refnamediv.refpurpose: Reconstruct a binary marker under a mask.

refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: out = imreconstruct(marker, mask); out = imreconstruct(marker, mask, connectivity)

listitem.para: A binary image contained in mask.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: imreconstruct repeatedly dilates the marker and clips it to the mask until stable.

refsection.title: Examples
